policy.proAdmission: Pro is not a default validation model. It is allowed only for high-risk permission/security, planning, recovery, failed verification, or Flash/source-truth conflict after Flash retry, and only when explicitly enabled.

steps.reason: source and tests define the expected truth before model judgment
local regression supports or rejects the source-truth claim
Flash is the default DSXU V24 live acceptance model

source_evidence: index.ts:67-97 — runPbt creates a temp directory, writes test code to disk, spawns 'bun test' via Bun.spawn with timeout and env, then cleans up. No mock mode used when config.mockRunner is absent.
index.ts:99-133 — runBunTest is the real child-process runner using Bun.spawn with pipe I/O and a timeout race. No mock/delegate.
index.ts:19-24 — suggestProperties uses real fs.readFile when config.mockSourceReader is absent.
index.ts:135-143 — defaultPurityCheck does real static analysis without mocks.
test_evidence: pbt.test.ts:132-143 — test 'real runner executes passing Bun test code' calls runPbt with { runs: 17, timeoutMs: 10_000 } and no mockRunner, expects passed:true.
pbt.test.ts:145-155 — test 'real runner reports failing Bun test output' calls runPbt without mockRunner, expects passed:false with error text.
pbt.test.ts:99-130 — three tests that use mockRunner are isolated; the real-runner tests above run without mocks.
resultJson.pro_admission_reason: Source and tests verified. Two tests (lines 132, 145) execute runPbt with no mockRunner, exercising the real Bun.spawn-based child process runner that writes temp files and executes bun test. All evidence confirms a genuine real PBT runner exists.
